entry.title: New: Bill 150, CD1 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2026 BUDGET, INCREASING ESTIMATED REVENUES, OTHER INTERGOVERNMENTAL BY $64,469,830, CAPITAL IMPROVEMENT PROJECTS, DEPARTMENT OF WATER SUPPLY, COUNTYWIDE, AND APPENDIX C, DEPARTMENT OF WATER SUPPLY, COUNTYWIDE, NEW APPROPRIATION FOR $64,469,830 FOR COUNTYWIDE WILDFIRE DISASTER RELIEF PROJECTS"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
